name: PM-KISAN (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi)
description: Direct income support of ₹6,000/year to small and marginal farmer families.
application_steps: Visit pmkisan.gov.in or nearest Common Service Centre (CSC)
Click on 'New Farmer Registration'
Enter Aadhaar number and state
Fill in personal and bank details
Upload land records
Submit and note registration number

name: Pradhan Mantri Jan Dhan Yojana (PMJDY)
description: Zero-balance bank accounts with RuPay debit card, overdraft facility up to ₹10,000, and accident insurance cover.
benefit: Zero-balance account + ₹2 lakh accident insurance + ₹10,000 overdraft
required_documents: Aadhaar Card or Voter ID or Passport
application_steps: Visit nearest bank branch or Business Correspondent (BC) point
Fill PMJDY account opening form
Submit KYC documents (Aadhaar / Voter ID)
Receive RuPay debit card within 10 working days

name: Pradhan Mantri Awas Yojana - Gramin (PMAY-G)
description: Financial assistance to BPL households in rural areas for construction of pucca house.
benefit: ₹1.2 lakh (plain areas) or ₹1.3 lakh (hilly/difficult areas) for house construction
application_steps: Check name in SECC-2011 Permanent Wait List at Gram Panchayat
Approach Gram Panchayat or Block Development Office
Fill application form with Aadhaar and bank details
Survey by Gram Rozgar Sahayak
Receive sanction letter and first installment after approval

name: Pradhan Mantri Suraksha Bima Yojana (PMSBY)
description: Accidental death and disability insurance cover at just ₹20/year premium.
benefit: ₹2 lakh on accidental death or permanent disability; ₹1 lakh on partial disability
application_steps: Log in to your bank's net banking or visit branch
Go to 'Insurance' or 'Social Security Schemes' section
Select PMSBY and authorize auto-debit of ₹20/year
Receive confirmation SMS with policy number

name: PM MUDRA Yojana (Micro Units Development & Refinance Agency)
description: Collateral-free loans up to ₹10 lakh for non-farm micro/small enterprises.
application_steps: Visit any bank, MFI, or NBFC or apply at udyamimitra.in
Choose loan category: Shishu / Kishore / Tarun
Fill MUDRA loan application form
Submit KYC documents and business details
Bank appraises and sanctions loan
Receive MUDRA card (RuPay) for working capital

name: Ujjwala Yojana (PMUY)
description: Free LPG connection to women from BPL households.
ministry: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
application_steps: Submit Ujjwala form with Aadhaar and bank details to nearest LPG distributor

name: Sukanya Samriddhi Yojana
benefit: 8.2% p.a. tax-free savings for girl child
application_steps: Parent/guardian opens account at post office or authorized bank

name: Mahatma Gandhi National Rural Employment Guarantee Act (MGNREGA)
description: 100 days guaranteed wage work per year for rural households.
benefit: 100 days guaranteed wage work per year
application_steps: Apply for Job Card at Gram Panchayat
Apply for work

name: PM Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
benefit: Crop loss insurance at 2% premium for kharif, 1.5% for rabi
application_steps: Apply at bank where you have bank account

name: National Scholarship Portal (NSP - Post-Matric Minority)
application_steps: Apply online on National Scholarship Portal
